findings.summary: Public /api/ullata provider endpoint has no abuse guard (auth/rate-limit), creating key-cost burn risk.
findings.recommendation: Add lightweight abuse controls: per-IP throttling, request budget caps, and reject patterns for abusive bursts.

findings.summary: Main bundle is heavy for mobile because map data layers are statically imported into app runtime.
findings.recommendation: Code-split/lazy-load BusMapPicker and large map data layers only when map flow opens.

findings.summary: Client-controlled prompt/systemPrompt values are forwarded to providers without strict length limits.
findings.recommendation: Enforce max lengths and whitelist/override systemPrompt server-side.

findings.summary: Home bus card requests geolocation immediately on render instead of explicit user action.
findings.recommendation: Gate geolocation behind explicit CTA, matching BussTab consent behavior.

findings.summary: Map `setView(initialCenter)` runs whenever initialCenter changes and may interrupt user pan/zoom sessions.
findings.recommendation: Add recenter guard to avoid automatic recenter during active manual map interaction.

findings.summary: No lint/test scripts are defined, reducing automated regression detection.
findings.recommendation: Add minimal lint/test scripts and CI execution gates.

findings.summary: Saved-place normalization and geocode-stub logic are duplicated across hooks/components.
findings.recommendation: Consolidate into one shared place-storage/geocoding service hook.

findings.summary: Diary PIN uses reversible base64 in localStorage and entries are plain localStorage text.
findings.recommendation: Add local encryption or explicit risk disclosure if encryption is deferred.

findings.summary: Settings UI offers `Leia asukoht` action while backend geocoding is intentionally not connected.
findings.recommendation: Disable/hide CTA until geocoding is active, or ship real geocoding provider.

findings.summary: Runtime bus data includes absolute local source paths in metadata.
findings.recommendation: Sanitize generator output to remove local machine paths from runtime metadata.

findings.summary: Current bus/GTFS/line/shape layers are internally consistent (no missing stopId references found in audit checks).
findings.recommendation: Keep this consistency validation as a reusable script in future data passes.
